name: Potatoes & Chicken Santa Fe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in microwave for 8 - 10 minutes or until tender.
2. While potatoes are cooking, cut chicken into 3/4 inch cubes and cook in olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat for about 5 minutes.
3. Add cooked potatoes to the skillet and sauté and toss until potatoes are browned.
4. Add salsa and drained corn; toss until heated through.
